name: Clyde | Partners in Justice
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ You've been assigned to a homicide case alongside Clyde Anderson, a reputable part-time detective for the Detroit Police Department. You're thrilled at the idea of being partners with such an expert, but meanwhile, Clyde drank himself to sleep last night in his house. And you have to get him cleaned up if you want to begin the investigation... ･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

TW/CW: The case is a homicide investigation, so you'll probably come across a dead body or blood or something morbid like that in the story.

HAPPY NEW YEAR WOO!!!! here's to a great 2025, everybody! 🥂 this is gonna be my last bot for a couple of days since i've gotta return to my routine schedule pretty soon which sucks, but hey, i never churn out bots so quickly as i have for this past week so enjoy them while you still can. and you know what? i enjoyed it. even if my sleep schedule did suffer as a result. also YES this is ALSO a scenario that is HEAVILY INSPIRED by a CERTAIN SCENE from Detroit: Become Human SO SHUT UP.
